claims.headline: Builds trust & connection
claims.notesSentence: Intranasal oxytocin significantly increased trust behavior in a controlled human economic-game study.

claims.headline: Calms stress under pressure
claims.notesSentence: Combined with social support, suppressed cortisol and subjective stress in a psychosocial stress test.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Oxytocin stress buffering study on PubMed

claims.headline: Sharper social awareness
claims.notesSentence: Improved recognition of subtle emotional cues from the eyes in a placebo-controlled human trial.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Oxytocin social cognition study on PubMed

claims.headline: Brighter social memories
claims.notesSentence: Enhanced recall of positive social information in a double-blind, placebo-controlled human trial.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Oxytocin positive memory study on PubMed

claims.headline: Quiets social anxiety
claims.notesSentence: fMRI evidence shows dampened amygdala reactivity to threatening social stimuli.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Oxytocin amygdala fMRI study on PubMed
